title: Dhammapada, Chapter 22: Hell
description: Chapter 22 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 22 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: Whoever speaks untruth goes to hell, as does one who, having done something, says 'I did not do it.' Both are equal in the hereafter.
